text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's lunchtime, and the cafeteria is packed with
people. In the midst of it all is Narita Taishin
wearing her trademark grim expression.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I should have one more meat dish... Hmm, I probably
can't eat that much. I could handle a salad, but I need
the protein...
choice_data_list:
You shouldn't force yourself to eat more than
you want.

You shouldn't force yourself to eat more than
you want.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume are known for their ravenous
appetites, but Narita Taishin is a comparatively
light eater.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She always ends up eating to the point of looking
sick, which I can't help but worry about.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Shut your pie hole. I should at least eat more than
the others since I'm on the smaller side.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Otherwise... I'll never catch up.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! That tenacity of yours is most excellent!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hello there! Sorry for the intrusion! But I guess cutting in out of nowhere is what makes me me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tachyon... What do you want?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I imagine you won't be very surprised as to why I
am here, for it is none other than to request your
assistance with an experiment!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Shot down without hesitation! It's not just
your running that's fast, eh, Demon Legs?
However, my friend...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Would you change your mind if I told you that the
medicines I'm sampling out can help with your
diet woes?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hear me out. Adjusting your diet is a crucial
aspect of bulking up.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As such, I invented two medicines! Medicine A
significantly speeds up digestion, and Medicine B
boosts nutrient absorption!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now, I know you seek to obtain a certain body
type, Taishin. So tell me... How do you truly feel
about this?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Just so it's clear, I'm not gonna be your guinea
pig. If anything, I'm going to be the one using
you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So you mean to say, we have a deal! Very well, let
us start the experiment right awa—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Telling Narita Taishin not to do this likely won't
work since she's so stubborn. But I should at least
suggest the safer-sounding one!
choice_data_list:
Suggest she take the medicine that hastens
digestion.

Suggest she take the medicine that boosts
nutrient absorption.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What are you jumping in for? Whatever. I was fine
with either choice anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin takes the medicine and, with a
furrowed brow, downs it in one go!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
No way. This is so cool—I'm getting hungry! I've
still got room for more food!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Eeexcellent. Nothing warms my heart
more than great results!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Heh! I can definitely get used to this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At first, Narita Taishin is delighted by the
medicine's effects, but before long...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grumble...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, again?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Goodness me, Taishin! Are you still hungry? Don't
worry!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll whip you up a midnight snack. Hehe, eat as
much as you want! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's fine, I don't need more— Creek! Dammit, I'm
telling you to stop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears she's decided against taking more of
the medicine after the ordeal she went through.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What are you jumping in for? Whatever. I was fine
with either choice anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin takes the medicine and, with a
furrowed brow, downs it in one go!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh, I feel like I can run forever. I've got so much
energy to spare!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She appears to be satisfied with the medicine's
tangible results.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Maybe I should use heavier ankle weights now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I've gained some muscle after all! Heh.
